title: EU lawmakers adopt digital assets policy stance after MiCA transition ends
summary: The European Parliament adopted a digital assets report calling for further assessment of DeFi, staking, crypto lending and NFTs after MiCA’s transition period ended.

title: Coinbase gets UK license to expand into derivatives, equities
summary: Coinbase said its UK investment services authorization will allow institutional and advanced traders to access derivatives, while retail users will be able to trade equities.

title: Oil Creeps Higher as Fresh Ship Attacks Underscore Hormuz Risks
summary: Oil nudged higher following attacks on shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting continued risks to vessels in the critical waterway.

title: De Beers Makes Diamond Price Cuts for Shrinking Buyers Club
summary: De Beers has made some of the deepest ever cuts to its official diamond prices, potentially signaling an end to its years-long campaign to hold them well above the market rate.

title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC
American Bitcoin (Nasdaq: ABTC) said its treasury has surpassed 8,000 BTC.
This post Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zi

title: USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
After years of development, UTEXO—backed by Tether—rolls out Bitcoin-native USDT with client-side validation, slashing fees and middlemen compared to Tron or Ethereum rails.
This post USDT Returns to Bitcoi

title: Morning Minute: Strategy Turns Net Seller
summary: Michael Saylor becomes a major Bitcoin seller. A memecoin gets "exploited" via governance. And Bernstein doubles down on a $150k BTC call.

title: Traders Sue Polymarket Over 'No' Ruling on Strategy Bitcoin Sale
summary: The plaintiffs say Polymarket added a rule after the fact, turning their winning "Yes" bet on Strategy's Bitcoin sale into a loss.

title: Bitcoin’s early July bounce rides thin summer liquidity as half of supply still sits underwater: analysts
summary: BTC traded around $63,500 after a six-day rally as Wintermute and Bitfinex flagged weak ETF demand, while K33 said 50% of supply is at a loss.

title: Coinbase secures UK investment services license to add derivatives and equities trading
summary: Coinbase secured a UK investment services license to offer derivatives and equities trading in addition to crypto.

title: French far-right leader Le Pen cleared to run for president
summary: Appeals court shortens sentence for embezzlement but electronic monitoring could hinder her ability to campaign

title: How Europe would fight without America
summary: As Nato meets, the continent is starting to think about how to defend itself without the US
